PRO HAC VICE RENEWAL FEE STATUS FOR ATTORNEY PHILIP A. KULINSKI
Off Calendar Aug-06-2024 Continued To Aug-28-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition Of Sarah Smith To Perpetuate Testimony Of Anthony Adams By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Jul-06-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES Via CourtCall:
Andrew Chew of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for petitioner and moving party Sarah Smith.
James Buck of POND NORTH LLP (213-617-6170), appearing for respondent and opposing party Regal Beloit America, Inc.
Lance Wilson of TUCKER ELLIS LLP (415-617-2400), appearing for respondent and opposing party Lincoln Electric Company.
Christine M. North of POND NORTH LLP (213-623-3594), appearing for respondents Fasco and Stearns.
Stephen L. Jenkins of GOLDBERG SEGALLA LLP (415-432-6600) appearing for respondent Cummins, Inc.
Kime H. Smith of HAWKINS PARNELL & YOUNG (415-766-3200) appearing for Intervenor for Marconi Plastering Co.
Jason Kort of DLA PIPER (US), LLP (415-836-2631), appearing for respondent Colombus McKinnon Corporation.
Michael C. Scanlon, Jr. of MANNING, GROSS & MASSENBURG (925-947-1300), appearing for respondent Caterpillar, Inc.

RULING:
Hearing held, argued and tentative ruling amended as follows: The Petition of Sarah Smith to Perpetuate Testimony of Anthony Adams by Videotaped Deposition is GRANTED under C.C.P. section 2035.010. Opposition filed by Specially Appearing Respondent Lincoln Electric Company. Joinder to Lincoln Electric Company's opposition filed by Specially Appearing Respondent Reliance Electric Company. Opposition filed by Respondent Regal Beloit America, Inc. Reply filed by Petitioner. Adverse parties were provided notice. The videotaped deposition of Anthony Adams will occur by Zoom or remote technology within forty five days. All parties are to file a Special Notice of Appearance within five Court days.

All parties to provide relevant discovery from Anthony Adams's two prior actions in California and New York state court, including: (1) all sets of form interrogatories and responses; (2) all sets of special interrogatories and responses; (3) all requests for admissions; (4) any requests for supplemental discovery with regard to form interrogatories and special interrogatories; (5) all expert discovery regarding medical records, including testimony from Anthony Adams's treating physician and Respondent's physicians who conducted independent medical examinations of Anthony Adams and/or conducted a review of Anthony Adams's medical records; and (6) contact information for court reporters to order transcripts of the deposition(s) of Anthony Adams. Respondent Lincoln Electric Company's oral request for petitioner to serve discovery request prior to deposition is DENIED. Respondent Fastco and Stern's oral request for exemption due to litigation in prior lawsuit is DENIED. Court to issue and serve order. Judge: Samuel K. Feng, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/SKF)
